hooks.command: FILEPATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if echo "$FILEPATH" | grep -qE "\.env$"; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Reading .env files is not allowed."}'; fi
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.html$' && npx prettier --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
